cv_data.profile: Operations and engineering project lead with experience in production optimization, delivery governance, and cross-functional execution in regulated environments.

work_experience.title: Operations Lead
bullets: Led cross-functional process improvements across production lines and support functions.
Reduced defects and improved throughput via structured quality controls and review loops.
Introduced standard work and escalation paths to stabilize daily operations.
Partnered with quality and engineering teams to close recurring deviation patterns.

work_experience.title: Project Manager
bullets: Managed project scope, schedule and delivery for industrial infrastructure projects.
Coordinated stakeholders and suppliers to deliver milestones on time and within budget.
Prepared status communication and risk logs for governance checkpoints.
Drove handover readiness and documentation quality before go-live phases.

work_experience.title: Service Delivery Coordinator
bullets: Coordinated field execution plans with internal teams and external partners.
Tracked service KPIs and escalated blockers impacting SLA commitments.
Improved issue triage quality with standardized intake and prioritization rules.

work_experience.title: Junior Process Engineer
bullets: Supported process mapping and baseline data collection for improvement projects.
Prepared technical documentation for implementation and audit readiness.
Assisted in root-cause investigations and verification of corrective actions.

education.title: BSc Technical Management
details: Project delivery and quality management track
